q: The car has a divider to separate the front passengers from the rear, in case you want _______ around like Miss Daisy.
Save the green and blue before our future generation _______ everything black.
Attached is the invoice that _______ (detail) the expenses incurred during the team's business trip.
Attached is the new company policy on remote work and _______ should be distributed to all employees as soon as possible.
My visit to the historical museum left me _______ deeply appreciative of our ancestors' struggles and achievements.
Our school's art team _______ the top spot in the state-level competition.
The snowflakes and ice _______ your warmth.
It was agreed that the teacher would _______ (organise) the science fair for the students of grade B.
The quarterly performance report is attached and _______ requires immediate attention from the management team.
A homestay is _______ (stay) in someone's house as a paying guest for a short period of time.
The hikers trudged up the narrow _______ (wind) path on the fourth day of the trek.
His offence was grave, but he _______ with a fine.
With your cooperation, we _______ win the match.
